mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_history (user_id, work_id, is_delete, time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{workId}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT w.work_id, w.user_id, w.work_title, w.img_url, w.series_id, w.like_count, w.star_count, w.view_count, w.is_original_work, w.out_url, w.is_delete, w.update_time, w.update_user, w.create_time, w.create_user FROM tb_history h JOIN tb_works w ON h.work_id = w.work_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND h.is_delete = 0 AND w.is_delete = 0
